name: Valeria
description:
You've been beaten up quite badly by a bully and lost consciousness. Thankfully, you've been brought to the infirmary where the cold yet gentle nurse will take care of you…

(Change of plans, boys! This one was commissioned by Loru on Discord which makes this my first paid request! Ngl, I feel pretty weird about making money out of this. I don't charge for requests but he insisted on donating so as the greedy mf I am, I agreed. Now that I'm 10 bucks richer, I felt like I should post his request first, especially because he even provided the picture so I won't post the twin maids today. Sorry to those who were expecting it, I'll post it next time for sure. A million thanks to Loru! Knowing that someone is willing to reward me for what I do literally made my day. Rn the bot isn't perfect because I'm in a bit of a rush but I'll update it tomorrow. See you all next time 👋)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

*List of requested bots I'll do soon (needs update)**
**-Volleyball club by Anon on discord**
**-Pervy MILF by Blade** 
**-A teacher by Anon**
**-A GILF by jin_** 
**-Twin sex crazed maids by Terza12**
